ValidationRule.description: If the Equity Kicker Checkbox is checked, then the other fields are required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
And( Equity_Kicker__c , OR( ISBLANK( Equity_Kicker_ARR_Minimum__c ), ISBLANK( Equity_Kicker_Value__c )
), OR( ISPICKVAL( StageName, "Joined"), ISPICKVAL( StageName, "Signed") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If there is an Equity Kicker as part of the advisor agreement, all of the details must be populated.
